_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
min_doctor_qualification: Diploma in Orthopedics with 10 years of experience
clinical_indications: Correction of deformities in long bones.
Early-stage osteoarthritis that has damaged just one side of the knee joint.
Shifting weight off damaged side of joint to relieve pain and improve function in an arthritic knee.
Goals of knee osteotomy: transfer weight from the arthritic part of the knee to a healthier area.
Goals of knee osteotomy: correct poor knee alignment.
Goals of knee osteotomy: prolong the life span of the knee joint.

preauth.label: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission
X-ray with patient ID, date and side (Left/ Right) - affected part justifying the procedure

claim.label: Post procedure X-ray with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right)

cpd_claim.q: Does the Post procedure X ray show the implant in Long bone Osteotomy?

common_queries: Invoice and barcode of implant is missing at claim submission for Long bone Osteotomy.
Post-procedure X-ray for Long bone Osteotomy does not show the implant.
Missing X-ray with patient ID, date, and affected side for pre-authorization.
Missing clinical photograph of affected part for pre-authorization.
Missing Detailed Indoor case papers at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: Osteotomy literally means "cutting of the bone."
Osteotomy can fix problems in many different bones and joints such as Hip, Knee, Spine, Jaw, Big toe, Chin.
additional_information.post_op_care: One advantage of the procedure is that, by preserving knee anatomy, a successful osteotomy may delay the need for a joint replacement for several years. Another advantage is that there are no restrictions on physical activities after an osteotomy.
